segments.text: Praise God in His sanctuary; Praise Him in His mighty firmament!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise Him for His mighty acts; Praise Him according to His excellent greatness!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise Him with the sound of the trumpet; Praise Him with the lute and harp!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise Him with the timbrel and dance; Praise Him with stringed instruments and flutes!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise Him with loud cymbals; Praise Him with clashing cymbals!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let everything that has breath praise the Lord.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
